archiveIntegration.note: CMS管理后台内容与GitHub存档通过_i18n API桥接。CMS更新→Redis刷新→_i18n API更新→diff系统检测→触发存档更新
archiveIntegration.gapFound: 市政行业30页存在于sitemap但_i18n API返回空——Redis与CMS数据不同步的典型案例
archiveIntegration.solution: CMS内容发布后需确认Redis同步完成(调用_i18n API验证)，建议加CMS发布后的webhook通知

langParamFormat.note: lang parameter must use full locale codes, not short codes

langContents.structure: {langCode: {articleTitle, articleSubtitle, articleContent, articleSummary, seoTitle, seoDescription, seoKeywords, ogTitle, ogDescription, tags, urlSlug}}
langContents.tagsFormat: tags must be a JSON array string: json.dumps(['tag1','tag2']). Plain comma-separated strings cause MySQL Data Truncation error 'Invalid JSON text'
langContents.specialCharNote: The ¥ symbol and < > characters in content may cause 400 Bad Request. Replace ¥ with RMB/literal amount, < with proper escaping. The server likely has WAF/XSS filtering.

updatePayload.note: PUT /api/cms/multilingual/articles/{id} accepts partial langContents. To add translations to existing article, send ONLY the new langCode entries. The API merges, not replaces.

publishing.note: Articles created with status=1 are DRAFTS. Must explicitly call POST .../{id}/publish to make them publicly visible. Batch publish via parallel curl.

batchTranslationPatterns.strategy: For 33+ articles × 4 languages, direct LLM translation via PUT is faster than backend async /api/cms/ai/translate (which stores tasks in volatile memory and loses state on restart).
batchTranslationPatterns.speedRate: ~1 article/sec via PUT with inline translations. Backend async: minutes per article plus polling overhead.
batchTranslationPatterns.retryStrategy: Python urllib with 3-attempt loop + 2-3s delay handles 502/503 from overload. WAF requires User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 header.
batchTranslationPatterns.contentOptimization: For SEO+translation quality: translate full title/subtitle/summary/SEO fields. Content can be condensed to 80-150 words while preserving core narrative and technical claims. Full verbatim translation is unnecessary for EEAT—consistency of key claims matters more.

serverStability.502BadGateway: Server overloads under heavy parallel writes. Implement per-request retry + backoff. Use max 2-3 concurrent writes.
serverStability.403Forbidden: WAF blocks requests without browser User-Agent. Always include 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0'.
serverStability.400BadRequest: Caused by: special chars (¥, <, >) triggering WAF/XSS filter, or tags field not being valid JSON array, or articleCode collision with existing.
